title: IFS-Bihar-Cadre-and-Pay-2015

(i) इन िविनयम犘 को भारतीय वन सेवा (संवग榁 पद-सं榐या का िनयतन) संशोधन िविनयमावली, 2015 कहा जाएगा । (ii) ये िविनयम सरकारी राजप灴 म犆 उनके 灹काशन क琉 तारीख से 灹वृ瀄त ह犘गे। 2. भारतीय वन सेवा (संवग榁 पद-सं榐या का िनयतन) िविनयमावली, 1966 क琉 अनुसूची म犆 ““““िबहार िबहार िबहार िबहार”””” शीष榁क के िलए और उनके अंतग榁त आने वाली 灹िवि玗य犘 के िलए िन瀓निलिखत 灹ित瀡थािपत 琈कया जाएगा, अथा榁त् :— ““““िबहार िबहार िबहार िबहार”””” रा榖य 24.09.2013 145. 609(अ) 26.08.2008 173. 515 (अ) 18.07.2014 146. 109(अ) 21.02.2008 147. 610(अ) 26.08.2008 148. 716(अ) 03.10.2008 NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 16th February, 2015 G.S.R. 103(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of Section 3 of the All India Service Act, 1951 (61 of 1951), read with sub-rule 2 of Rule 4 of Indian Forest Service (Cadre) Rules, 1966, the Central Government in consultation with the Government of Bihar hereby makes the following regulations further to amend the Indian Forest Service (Fixation of Cadre Strength) Regulations, 1966, namely :— 1. (i) These regulations shall be called the Indian Forest Service (Fixation of Cadre Strength) Amendment Regulations, 2015. (ii) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Schedule to the Indian Forest Service (Fixation of Cadre Strength) Regulations, 1966, for the heading "Bihar" and the entries occurring there under, the following shall be substituted, namely :— -- 4 of 10 -- 14 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] “Bihar SENIOR DUTY POSTS UNDER THE STATE GOVERNMENT 46 Principal Chief Conservator of Forests & Head of the Forest Force 1 Principal Chief Conservator of Forests (Development) 1 Additional Principal Chief Conservator of Forests-cum-Chief Wildlife Warden 1 Additional Principal Chief Conservator of Forests (CAMPA) cum Nodal Officer 1 Additional Principal Chief Conservator of Forests (Working Plan, Research & Extension) 1 Chief Conservator of Forests Patna, Muzaffarpur, Bhagalpur 3 Director Ecology & Environment 1 Chief Bhagalpur, Gaya, Patna, Muzaffarpur, Siwan, Purnea 6 Conservator of Forests –cum-Field Director, Valmiki Tiger Reserve, Bettiah 1 Conservator of Forests Working Plan, Research & Extension 1 Conservator of Forests (Wildlife) Patna 1 Conservator of Forests (Headquarters) 1 Conservator of Forests (Monitoring & Evaluation) 1 Deputy Conservator of Forests, Banka ForestDivision, Gaya Forest Division, Munger Forest Division, Rohtas Forest Division, Kaimur Forest Division, Jamui Forest Division, Aurangabad Forest Division, Nawada Forest Division, Mithila Forest Division, Purnea Forest Division, Saran Forest Division, Tirhut Forest Division, Begusarai Forest Division, Patna Forest Division 14 Deputy Director, Tiger Reserve, West Champaran Division 1 Deputy Director, Tiger Reserve, West Champaran Division II 1 Deputy Conservator of Forests (Working Plan), Patna 1 Director, Sanjay Gandhi Biological Park 1 Deputy Conservator of Forests, Nalanda Forest Division, Bhojpur Forest Division ,Gopalganj Forest Division, Araria Forest Division, Research Training & Public Relations Division 5 1. Total Senior Duty Posts 46 2. Central Deputation Reserve not exceeding 20% of Item 1 above 9 3. State Deputation Reserve not exceeding 25% of Item 1 above 11 4. Training Reserve not exceeding 3.5% of Item 1 above 1 5. Leave Reserve and Junior Posts Reserve not exceeding 16.5% of Item 1 above 7 6. Posts to be filled by promotion under Rule 8 of the Indian Forest Service (Recruitment) Rules 1966 not exceeding 33 1/3 % of Item 1, 2, 3 and 4 above 22 7. Posts to be filled up by Direct Recruitment (Item 1+2+3+4+5-6) 52 Total Authorized Strength (Item 6+7 above) 74” [F. No.16016/2/2011 - AIS-II (A)] JISHNU BARUA, Jt. Secy. (Service & Vigilance-II) Note-1: Prior to the issue of this Notification, the total authorized strength of the IFS cadre of Bihar was 58. Section 3 of the All India Services Act, 1951 (61 of 1951) the Central Government in consultation with the Government of Bihar hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Indian Forest Service (Pay) Rules, 2007 namely:- 1. (i) These Rules shall be called the Indian Forest Service (Pay) Amendment Rules, 2015. (ii) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Indian Forest Service (Pay) Rules, 2007:- (a) In Schedule II- A Posts carrying pay above the Time Scale in the Indian Forest Service under the State Governments, in the Table, for the entry “Bihar” appearing in the first column and the corresponding entry in the second column, the following shall be substituted, namely:- “Bihar Principal Chief Conservator of Forests & Head of the Forest Force Rs 80,000/- (Fixed) Principal Chief Conservator of Forests, (Development) HAG+:Rs.75500 (Annual increment @ 3%)-Rs.80000/- Additional Principal Chief Conservator of Forests-cum- Chief Wildlife Warden HAG Scale: Rs.67000-(annual increment @ 3%) 79000/- Additional Principal Chief Conservator of Forests (CAMPA) cum Nodal Officer HAG Scale: Rs.67000-(annual increment @ 3%) 79000/- Additional Principal Chief Conservator of Forests (Working Plan, Research & Extension) HAG Scale: Rs.67000-(annual increment @ 3%) 79000/- -- 9 of 10 -- ¹Hkkx IIμ[k.M 3(i)º Hkkjr dk jkti=k % vlk/kj.k 19 Chief
